name: Commercial & Revenue Control Plane

scenarios.title: Create a durable commercial and revenue control packet
steps: Open the Sprint 6 Commercial & Revenue Control workspace.
Review revenue operations, finance, contract, customer, quote, sales-order, pricing snapshot, invoice audit, and action queue signals.
expected: A durable AssistantCommercialRevenueControlPacket row is created with source summary, quote-to-cash, pricing discipline, margin leakage, invoice audit, customer-commercial, contract handoff, response plan, rollback plan, and leadership summary JSON.
An AssistantAuditEvent records that packet creation is evidence-only.

No CRM quote, quote line, pricing snapshot, tariff, RFQ, invoice intake, accounting approval, contract, sales order, opportunity stage, customer promise, or external communication is changed automatically.

scenarios.title: Queue commercial control review
steps: Add an optional commercial review note to a draft Sprint 6 packet.
expected: The packet moves to REVIEW_QUEUED and stores actionQueueItemId.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created for commercial_revenue_control_review with the packet URL and source evidence.
Review work remains separate from execution; the assistant does not mutate prices, quotes, invoices, contracts, orders, accounting decisions, or customer messages.

scenarios.title: Approve a reviewed Sprint 6 packet
steps: Review the packet leadership summary, risk counts, rollback plan, and note.
expected: The packet status becomes APPROVED with approvedAt, approvedByUserId, and approvalNote.
An AssistantAuditEvent records approval and reiterates the no-silent-mutation guardrail.
Approval marks the commercial evidence packet as reviewed only; execution still requires separate downstream approved actions.

guardrails: No quote amount, quote line, opportunity stage, or sales order is changed automatically.
No tariff, RFQ, pricing snapshot, margin assumption, or commercial term is changed automatically.
No invoice audit decision, dispute submission, accounting approval, or accounting export is changed automatically.
No contract is created, amended, sent, approved, or signed automatically.
No customer promise, discount, credit, or external commercial message is sent automatically.
